rows.body: Hi {{first_name}}, this is Mykoal DeShazo with Adaxa Home (NMLS 1912347). Thanks for reaching out at smartr8.com. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help.
{{first_name}}, whatever your goal, buying, refinancing, or an investment property, I can help you find the right path. Want a quick call?

rows.subject: A quick question for you, {{first_name}}
rows.preheader: Knowing your goal helps me point you the right way.
rows.body:
Everyone comes to us with a different goal. Knowing yours helps me share the most useful next steps, whether that is a purchase, a refinance, or financing an investment property.

Reply and tell me what you are thinking about, and I will guide you from there.
Happy to answer any mortgage questions you have, no obligation. Reply here or call (480) 206 9290 any time. Mykoal.
Even if you are just exploring, a short conversation can clarify your options. What time works this week? Mykoal.

rows.subject: Here to help whenever you need it
rows.preheader: A short conversation can clarify your options.
rows.body:
Even if you are early in the process, a quick conversation often brings clarity and saves time later.

Reply to this email or call (480) 206 9290 whenever you are ready, and I will help you find the right path.
{{first_name}}, I am glad to be a resource whenever you need one. Call (480) 206 9290 with any questions. Reply STOP to opt out. Mykoal.
{{first_name}}, reach out any time and I will point you in the right direction. Call (480) 206 9290. Reply STOP to opt out. Mykoal.
